error.cannot_fetch_teams: Could not fetch teams from ESPN. Check your connection and try again.
error.no_teams_found: No teams found for that search term. Try a different name or leave blank for manual entry.

user.title: Select Sport
user.description: Choose the sport for your team or athlete.

search.title: Search Team
search.description: Type name to search for the {league_name} team, or leave blank to enter the team ID manually.

select_team.title: Select Team
select_team.description: Choose your {league_name} team from the search results.

manual_team.title: Manual Team Entry
manual_team.description: Enter the {league_name} team abbreviation or ID number as shown on ESPN, or '*' to match the active/most recent game.

manual_athlete.title: Manual Athlete Entry
manual_athlete.description: Enter the {league_name} athlete name, a regular expression, or '*' to match the active/most recent game.

custom_api.title: Custom API Configurator
custom_api.description: Enter the 'sport_path' and 'league_path' portion of the ESPN API to configure a custom API

finalize.title: Confirm Name
finalize.description: Confirm/change the name for the {league_name} {team_name} sensor

init.title: Team Tracker Options
init.description: Enter the 2-character language code to use for the API call.
